# Hardcoded admins who may steer ANY issue/PR agent flow, regardless of who
# opened the issue. One GitHub username per line. Lines starting with # and
# blank lines are ignored. Read by .github/scripts/authorize.sh.
#
# NOTE: allowlisting grants FULL parity (incl. /ready and /approved -> dev) on
# EVERY issue, not just the person's own. Add only people you trust like an
# admin. The issue's own author already gets PM *discussion* rights without
# being listed here (see pm-followup.yml) — the allowlist is for more than that.
MishaMgla
dmowski      # trusted creator (issue #43); full parity by owner decision 2026-06-21
